title: Recipes Refreshed PLUS
description: The insane version of Recipes Refreshed. Tons of new crafting recipes for blocks you didn't even know you wanted. (Now Configurable!)
body:
# Recipes Refreshed PLUS
If you liked [Recipes Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/mod/recipes-refreshed), you'll love PLUS.

In this version you get:

## Crafting
- Ores
- End Portal Frames
- Chain Armor
- Horse Armor
- Saddles
- Name Tags
- Enchanted Golden Apples
- Mushroom Blocks
- Shroomlights
- String
- Glowstone Dust
- Glow Ink Sacs
- Glow Lichen
- Sculk Sensors
- Grass Block
- Debug Stick
- Bedrock
- Budding Amethyst
- Cobwebs
- Bells
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Crying Obsidian
- Dead Bush

## Smelting
- Leather
- Concrete Powder
- Glass

## Everything From Recipes Refreshed
- More Stairs
- More Fences
- More Fence Gates
- More Pressure Plates
- More Buttons
- More Signs
- More Hanging Signs
- More Trapdoors
